user_query: How long was Max a part of Maria's family?

node_data.text: John recently had to say goodbye to his dog, Max, who was a part of their family for 10 years.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Directly states that Max was a part of the family for 10 years.

node_data.text: John shared a picture of Max to honor his memory and cherish the moments they had together.
